name: chatgpt-conversation-recall
description: A local-first Edge and Chrome extension that remembers and searches ChatGPT conversations you have opened.

scripts.test: node tests/archive-core.test.js && node tests/search-core.test.js && node tests/export-core.test.js
scripts.check: node --check background.js && node --check archive-core.js && node --check search-core.js && node --check export-core.js && node --check content.js && npm test
